\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3608 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{\mu\nu} = \eta_{\mu\nu} + h_{\mu\nu} \end{equation}
